tags.description: Was a loss making par 3 pitch & putt golf course. Now left to rewild. Possibly becoming footgolf
tags.name: The High Common
Moorlands Sandpits Play Area
tags.wheelchair:description: The site is split into 3 sections due to being on a slope with sloping tarmac paths. There are 3 entrances, the lower 2 entrances allowing wheelchair access. The lowest entrance provides access to the bulk of the play equipment.

tags.fixme: Unsure if this is to be maintained municipally or by the estate's developer.
tags.name: North Park
